name: Singlet-scalar extension for first-order electroweak phase transition
summary: Adding a real (or complex) gauge-singlet scalar S to the SM, coupling to the Higgs through |H|^2 S^2 and other gauge-invariant operators, can strengthen the electroweak phase transition into a strong first-order transition for portal coupling lambda_HS ~ 0.5-2 and singlet mass m_S ~ 100-300 GeV. Provides the departure-from-equilibrium condition required for electroweak baryogenesis with the observed m_h = 125 GeV. Predicts characteristic LHC signatures: Higgs di-Higgs (hh) production enhancement, modified h -> ZZ/gamma gamma branching ratios, and (if S is light) singlet-pair production through Higgs portal.

addresses_puzzles.note: Lattice studies (Niemi-Schicho-Tenkanen 2021, arXiv:2103.07467) show that two-step phase transitions in xSM with one-loop-corrected Coleman-Weinberg potential give v(T_c)/T_c > 1 over a broad parameter window. LHC reach (di-Higgs and singlet searches) probes the surviving regions.

Provides the SFOPT precondition for EWBG; needs additional CP violation in extended Higgs/Yukawa sector to actually produce eta_B. Together with two-Higgs-doublet CP phases or composite-Higgs CP, viable EWBG model.

touches_benchmarks.note: Modifies Higgs self-coupling lambda_hhh by O(1) (relevant for HL-LHC and future di-Higgs measurements). Higgs-singlet mixing modifies single-Higgs couplings at O(0.1).

new_fields: real or complex SM-singlet scalar S
introduces.note: Singlet mass, portal coupling lambda_HS, and singlet self-coupling lambda_S. Z_2 version (lambda_HS odd-coupling forbidden) can simultaneously serve as DM.

history: Choi-Volkas (1993), 'A polynomial scalar potential leading to electroweak baryogenesis', PLB 317, 385. Profumo-Ramsey-Musolf-Shaughnessy (2007), 'Singlet Higgs phenomenology and the electroweak phase transition', arXiv:0705.2425 - benchmark phenomenology. Lattice update: Niemi, Schicho, Tenkanen (2021), 'Singlet-assisted electroweak phase transition at two loops', PRD 103, 115035, arXiv:2103.07467.

references.citation: Profumo, Ramsey-Musolf, Shaughnessy, 'Singlet Higgs phenomenology and the electroweak phase transition', JHEP 08, 010 (2007)
Niemi, Schicho, Tenkanen, 'Singlet-assisted electroweak phase transition at two loops', Phys. Rev. D 103, 115035 (2021)
